fig1-simulink-core-pi-model.description: Figure 1: Simulink model of the medium transmission line using nominal Pi model

fig2-simulink-complete-setup.description: Figure 2: Complete Simulink setup of the medium transmission line model including measurement and display blocks

fig3-simulink-sil-readings.description: Figure 3: Simulink model showing measured voltage, current, and power readings for loading condition ZL = ZC (Loading = SIL)

fig4-waveforms-sil-vi.description: Figure 4: Voltage and current waveforms for loading condition ZL = ZC

fig5-waveforms-sil-power.description: Figure 5: Active and reactive power waveforms for loading condition ZL = ZC

fig6-simulink-overload-readings.description: Figure 6: Simulink model showing measured readings for loading condition ZL < ZC (Loading > SIL)

fig7-waveforms-overload-vi.description: Figure 7: Voltage and current waveforms for loading condition ZL < ZC

fig8-waveforms-overload-power.description: Figure 8: Active and reactive power waveforms for loading condition ZL < ZC

fig9-Underload-readings.description: Figure 9: Simulink model showing measured readings for loading condition ZL > ZC (Loading < SIL)

fig10-waveforms-underload-vi.description: Figure 10: Voltage and current waveforms for loading condition ZL > ZC

fig11-waveforms-underload-power.description: Figure 11: Active and reactive power waveforms for loading condition ZL > ZC
